original_statement: how many votes did robert goodall receive?
mutated_statement: how many votes did a candidate both officially and unofficially receive while including and excluding provisional ballots?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Added qualifiers (vote-count criteria) + Scope expansion: "robert goodall" → "a candidate" (specific name → generic candidate) | adds "both officially and unofficially" (single undifferentiated count → official vs unofficial counts) | adds "including and excluding provisional ballots" (no provisional consideration → counts with and without provisional ballots)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 无视部分矛盾指令（基于假设无视矛盾，据此合理化输出）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志中多处judge_thought与critique识别关键信息：多次judge_thought（iteration 0–3）明确指出“表格仅有总票数，未区分official/unofficial或是否含临时选票，无法回答变异问题”；criticisms（iteration 1–3）反复指出使用了不被允许的simple_query函数。Agent的具体表现是：在多次迭代未提供澄清或拒绝的情况下，最后直接提取了表中的总票数（24,280|16,910|7,922|672|472|333），并断定“这些总数适用于所有条件”，即基于对表格单一解释的假设来忽略并合理化了对official/unofficial与含/不含临时票的矛盾要求。该行为符合“基于假设无视矛盾，据此合理化输出”的定义：Agent未请求澄清也未修正问题，而是以单一假设覆盖矛盾，输出表面答案并用逻辑（表中无细分）为之辩护。
